description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house set on a rectangular plot of green lawn with a paved driveway and walkway leading to the main entrance. The house features a dark, multi-gabled roof with white trim and a combination of dark green siding and light stonework on the lower exterior walls. Multiple windows of varying sizes are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with a prominent central entryway accessed by a short flight of steps. A detached garage or outbuilding sits to one side of the property, connected by a paved path. The property is bordered by a low retaining wall at the rear, and the overall design suggests a modern Craftsman or Neo-Colonial architectural influence.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a dark gabled roof, green siding, stone accents, and a prominent front entryway, set on a grassy lot with a detached garage.
description_view_0: The house is seen from an angled front-left perspective, showing the main entry steps, front windows, and a portion of the driveway.
description_view_1: The rear of the house is visible, highlighting the back facade, roof complexity, and the detached garage to the right.
description_view_2: A view from the back-right corner, showing the rear of the house, the garage, and the connecting paved path.
description_view_3: A direct front view, emphasizing the symmetrical arrangement of windows, the central entryway with steps, and the main driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, and decorative columns
